description: Resource Type definition for AWS::ImageBuilder::AllImageBuildVersions. Returns the list of image build versions for a specified image version ARN.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the image build version.
Arn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the image build version.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^arn:aws[^:]*:imagebuilder:[^:]+:(?:[0-9]{12}|aws(?:-[a-z-]+)?):image/[a-z0-9-_]+/[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+/[0-9]+$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Name.markdownDescription:
The name of the image.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^[-_A-Za-z-0-9][-_A-Za-z0-9 ]{1,126}[-_A-Za-z-0-9]$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Version.description: The semantic version of the image (major.minor.patch).
Version.markdownDescription:
The semantic version of the image (major.minor.patch).

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

BuildNumber.description: The build number of the image build version.
BuildNumber.markdownDescription:
The build number of the image build version.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^[0-9]+$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Type.description: Specifies whether this image produces an AMI or a container image.
Type.markdownDescription:
Specifies whether this image produces an AMI or a container image.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: AMI | DOCKER  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Platform.description: The operating system platform of the image.
Platform.markdownDescription:
The operating system platform of the image.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: Windows | Linux | macOS  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

OsVersion.description: The operating system version of the instances that launch from this image.
OsVersion.markdownDescription:
The operating system version of the instances that launch from this image.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

State.description: Image status and the reason for that status.

Status.markdownDescription:
The status of the image.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: PENDING | CREATING | BUILDING | TESTING | DISTRIBUTING | INTEGRATING | AVAILABLE | CANCELLED | FAILED | DEPRECATED | DELETED | DISABLED  
Update requires: No interruption

State.markdownDescription:
Image status and the reason for that status.

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

DateCreated.markdownDescription:
The date on which Image Builder created this image.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

BuildType.markdownDescription:
Indicates the type of build that created this image.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: USER_INITIATED | SCHEDULED | IMPORT | IMPORT_ISO  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

EnhancedImageMetadataEnabled.description: Indicates whether enhanced image metadata collection is enabled.
EnhancedImageMetadataEnabled.markdownDescription:
Indicates whether enhanced image metadata collection is enabled.

---

Required: No  
Type: Boolean  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

ImageTestsEnabled.description: Determines if tests should run after building the image.
ImageTestsEnabled.markdownDescription:
Determines if tests should run after building the image.

---

Required: No  
Type: Boolean  
Update requires: No interruption

TimeoutMinutes.description: The maximum time in minutes that tests are permitted to run.
TimeoutMinutes.markdownDescription:
The maximum time in minutes that tests are permitted to run.

---

Required: No  
Type: Integer  
Update requires: No interruption

ImageTestsConfiguration.markdownDescription:

Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

ExecutionRole.description: The execution role for the image.
ExecutionRole.markdownDescription:
The execution role for the image.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 2048  
Pattern: ^(?:arn:aws(?:-[a-z]+)*:iam::[0-9]{12}:role/)?[a-zA-Z_0-9+=,.@\-_/]+$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes
